input.message: Hey guys, last chance to sign up before the deadline!

assumptions: Cultural guidance represents tendencies, not rules — context always varies
Human localisation review is strongly recommended for production content

output.adapted_message: [Adapted for enterprise customers audience, Japan]:  last chance to sign up before the deadline!
notes: Hierarchy and collective framing are typically valued — address the group benefit before individual benefit
Indirect communication is often preferred — soften direct refusals or negative framing
Colours: red may be positive (luck) rather than negative (error) in East Asian contexts
Formal titles and organisation names carry significant weight — use them
output.uncertainty: Cultural guidance represents tendencies, not rules — context always varies
